text_preview:
* (see the other report given by the same witness at this link: BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.663)

SEPT 24, 2007. Time: 7:00 pm. Duration: 60 seconds. A resident of Parque Dez, in the city of Manaus, State of Amazonas, contacted the COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] to report the sighting of a flashing white UFO, apparently stationary in the sky. According to the witness, the weather conditions and visibility were good. In the official report of the sighting, the following observations were made by the UFO observer: “The object presented itself without movement, seemed to stand still and em
summary: On Sep 24, 2007 a Manaus resident observed a stationary white flashing UFO that emitted synchronous light pulses for ~50 seconds before vanishing instantaneously.
